author: @donation1913
text:
My favorite pastor Chuck Missler, in his lecture Beyond Newton, quantifies universal forces so we can get an idea of there effective ability. 
"If our sun were the size of a golf ball and the nearest star were the size of a golf ball they would be about 700 miles apart. How much effect do you think one golf ball has on another at 700 miles? Not much. The electromagnetic force has 36 orders of magnitude more effect than gravity. Gravity being 10^-2 and the Electromagnetic force 10^-38." His point, if there is motion in our universe between large bodies at a distance it is more likely to be electrical in nature not gravitational.

author: @JustinHallPlus
text:
I posted this on the original gravity video (before the audio was fixed), but I think it's worth sharing.

I think that the speed of light may be constantly decreasing, along with the energy of all subatomic particles.  Call it entropy on a dimensional scale.  The result would be that matter would be shrinking, the overall radius of electron orbits would be decreasing in perfect proportion to their electromagnetic, and nuclear forces.

In my hypothetical model, all 4 forces, all are decreasing uniformly.  The result is that bodies very close to each other wouldn't be able to tell much was happening.  They would be attracted and repelled by Vanderwall forces and everything else precisely as if there was nothing happening.

Here's where it gets interesting:  If you imagine my model, then objects far away from each other appear to expand away from one another.  The farther the object is away, the faster the "expansion" of the universe seems to be.  Light from far galaxies would be red shifted, because as the speed of light slows, older light would appear to have a lower frequency, and it would seem to be stretched out over a larger distance than expected.  The other thing that falls out of this argument is that the force on one side of a massive object would be slightly greater than the force on the near side because all known forces travel at below the speed of light.  That's where gravity appears.  The far side of the sun would appear to be slightly larger and closer than it really is in my theory.  The farther from Earth you get, the more dense, and more heavy it would appear to be.  This provides an inertial momentum TOWARDS the Earth, and impeding any motion away from each other based on their proximity.  To a reference frame equidistant to the two objects, there would be no difference in density between the two objects, and the reason for the force would be completely invisible.

This is probably just wrong, and an untestable hypothesis at best, but it may be a useful model.  I call it dimensional entropy, because it involves the loss of useful energy in the form of a change in the volumetric dimensions and properties of matter, and a decrease in the over all density of order in the universe.

I think Einstein's "constant" was real, but the constant is the amount of energy leaking out of our universe.  This is why the universe appears to be expanding without bounds, and the observable universe is 90 billion light years across, but only 14 billion years old.

I'm going to stop rambling and go to bed now.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Justin Hall you are right mate that was interesting and thanks for reposting - sorry i had to take the other one down

author: @rogerclaiborne6815
text: Observing gravity at the finite scale of being we may see two particles spinning around one and another, locked together in their orbit of each other so harmoniously that they appear to be one new entity.  Their charge is thus greater than a single spinning particle that approaches their static sphere of influence.  Since the two particles joined as one have a positive charge relative to the single particle which can be viewed as being negative because it has lesser mass and thus charge the two joined particles statically attract the lone particle.  Inertia from the speed, path, direction of lone particle's spin in relation to the two married particles may determine if it becomes locked in orbit, crashes into and joins with the married particles, or escapes it's static field of influence to go on it's own merry way to interact with other particles.  Gravity may thus be related to the static field phenomenon.   Looking at the solar system there appears to be a layered connection between solar bodies including their internal layers based upon a predominance charge from either dominate amounts of negative periodic table elements or positive periodic table elements so here too charge seems to play an important role.  If the Earth didn't have negative elements dominate on it's crust would it still be attracted to the hydrogen positive dominate Sun?  Would the slightly positive dominate crustal elements on the outer charged layer of the moon still orbit the negative outer crust of the Earth if the Moon gained more negative elements to itself in the future or would it then be more attracted to the positive Sun the more negative it became?

replies.author: @rogerclaiborne6815
replies.text:
Roger Claiborne Here are some of my musings.  Hope something is inspirational.Static ionization from the inertia of any moving object may create a gravity field between connected ion donors and receivers.  Larger mass donors or receivers could be viewed as having a virtual positive charge in this relationship regardless of actual electrical charge due to its greater mass and over all energy potential and density.  The smaller mass would be a virtual negative charge and thus would be pulled back to the larger energy potential regardless of it’s actual electrical charge or  magnetic polarity.

Gravity may be a non-linear elastic field between two moving objects of opposite virtual charge.   Gravity may also be made up of a type of particle medium composed of gravitons that creates a field and medium for exchange of waves between multiple moving objects.   When the gravity waves of  a larger energy density object echo off a smaller energy density object emitting weaker gravity waves and fields the two fields may become entangled and exert a pull push force upon each other from this entanglement.   This pull push from two entangle echoing waves may pull the weaker towards the larger faster than the larger is pulled or pushed from the smaller.  Depending upon the size of each depends upon which is pulled the fastest towards the other due to the greater or lesser inertia and kinetic energy value of each.  If the difference is great enough the larger will appear to remain motionless and unaffected by the smaller because its kinetic and inertial forces are too great to become overcome by the smaller before the smaller is either captured by the greater or its inertia, kinetic energy  and trajectory overcomes and escapes the greater higher frequencies and bandwidths of the field closest and stronger to the larger.  Gravity fields of influence are thus greater closer towards the center of their fields and progressively weaker with distance and frequency time between two moving objects.  Perhaps gravitons are also the medium of space/time itself.  Space/time may be the motion and interaction of gravitons between all objects from the sub-atomic all the way up to the macro level or scale of manifestation.  Perhaps space/time is a sub-atomic particle medium of echoing waves and entangled push/pull fields at the macro level strongest and at higher frequencies near the greater energy/mass densities. 

electrostatic repulsion may create interstellar vacuum, vacuum resistance creates gravity 

Explore the concept further of the intersteller  universe as being a singular hydrogen helium plasma crystal with impurities, gas bubbles, and inclusions of other minerals and their various interactions.

Perhaps gravity is the force of a vortex created by a moving object collapsing in on itself?

Perhaps gravity is vacuum suction pressure between the diffused energy state of ether and the condensed energy state and structure of ether to form matter.  Perhaps static fields and charges are the difference between strengths of opposing vacuum wells created by stable concentrations of collapsed ether structures in the formation of matter.

What is ether?  Perhaps ether  is energy.  Ether in its diffused energy state is potential energy and in its stable collapsed concentrated structures becomes matter.  Perhaps Vacuum is a void in ether when it collapses into concentrated structures which are held together and stabilized when the speed, spin, trajectory, and masses of collapsed anther interact and restructure themselves in an alternate stable manner.

If gravity is static field charge attraction; and static field charges are a result of opposing vacuum structures; then perhaps gravity is a by product of vacuum suction pressure.  Perhaps like collapsed concentrated ether structures and interaction perhaps vacuum forms alternating fields and interactions in response to the differing collapsed ether manifestations, strengths, and charges.  Perhaps opposing vacuum structures have their own concentrated forms and structures of fields, strengths and charges that interact with one another and is perceived as dark matter.

Interstellar space may be the next scale of manifestation of a type of diffused energy state that is made up of both concentrated energy manifesting as atoms and their gravity wells.  Interstellar space may be a balanced medium of  small scale vacuum and concentrated ether energy manifestation interspersed by larger interactions of larger and more intricate concentrated energy and vacuum structures created by the formation of solar systems, suns, planets, moons, comets, and asteroids from the accumulated interactions of interstellar dust and vacuum wells over time.  Galaxies that hold together and concentrate the interstellar medium of course are even larger organized structures and scales of concentrated ether and their resulting gravity wells and charges in relation to other galaxies in a universe.  Universes may even be a larger scale of concentrated ether  structures verses gravity structures that form from the collapse of the unified field that is all universes and gravity structures in the all.

replies.text: Robert Murray-Smith  I have several models of what it might be or how it might be.  Just musings I add on to and revisit.  But I suspect differences in net charges between predominate elements in large solar bodies that can accept electrons or donate electrons is linked to the phenomenon of gravity somehow.  The solar system and inner planetary layers seem to be arranged in alternating layers of predominately electron doners to predominate electron acceptors.  The Earth's crust seems to be predominately elements on the negative side of the periodic table while the inner elements seem to be on the positive.  The moon appears to be slightly more on the positive side which seems attracted to the Earth's dominately negative crust.  The whole solar system seems to be arranged in this way.  Also I suspect it may be related to vacuum created by condensing the energy fabric of the universe into differing masses of matter.  The more energy mass that is condensed from the static fabric of the universe into an observable focal body the more vacuum positive charge it may accumulate.  Just some other ways to ponder things sometime I hope.

author: @just1fix2004
text: I believe gravity is static electricity. Take a balloon and rub it on your hair, pour flour or plastic beads on it, and we are the beads. The same way the beads stick to the balloon we stick to the earth. As we are charged the same as the earth because the biggest gravitational pull determines the charge there is no electrical discharge when we leave the earths surface. You might say, "where is the hair to charge it?", well it is in the form of atmosphere constantly passing over the earths surface. So when the atmosphere gets choppy in a storm situation it gets closer to the earths surface and the negative and positive of the system make contact through lightning (like touching two battery cables together.) This is what Nicola Tesla was trying to harvest, that tower, it was not a transmitter, it was a way of collecting the ambient energy in the sky.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: ***** It will definitely be related to static - but i am not sure if it is static - still - interesting idea

replies.author: @just1fix2004
replies.text:
Robert Murray-Smith
I have come to the conclusion it has to be a reaction to an electrical field mixed with a magnetic one. if you look at the Earth as a big magnet and the atmosphere as coils surrounding that magnet, we all know that generates an electric field. the reason we are not effected electrically to that field is the same reason a bird can land on a power line, we're only touching one post of the battery. The makeup of everything consists of atoms which can also be charged magnetically. This I think is also why things levitate when large amounts of electricity is pumped into wire, the effects of the earths magnetic pull no loner effects the atoms in the wire.

author: @Raberuji
text: Im not a physicist but, could gravity and movement be the same thing? I like to think that gravity is formed from movement wich is everywhere. No single particle in the universe is "standing still" (not moving i mean). Like an atom ; within itself there is a core compose of negatif and positive particle and yet some electron are "orbiting" this structure. At this point we have a constant movement within every single particle. Where is this movement coming from exactly ? I think it come from the spinning action that most object experience flowing through time in an unbalanced spin cause by its core own polarity and that larger bodies exist following the "same" rule (ex: solar system. Galaxies). This "spinning" action could be the source of the gravity ; like a spinning magnet switching polarity every turn. This "force" could bring other particle to "orbit" it if the spin is strong and/or stable enough (ex; at the molecular level ; making/breaking chemical bond between particle... or making a "stable" solar system)... well this is all i have so far.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Raberuji I think you are right mate

author: @Opdehoede
text:
Since you are a very good experimenter and have a well equiped lab, I want to bring to your attention the flurry of people trying to replicate Parkhomov's Ni H LiAl hydrate LENR fusor wich in turn is a simular to Rossi's Hot-Cat as verified in Lugano over the course of 6 months by an international team of scientists.
One of the experimenters here: http://www.e-catworld.com/2015/05/12/live-parkhomov-style-lenr-test-by-me365-sat-may-9th/
Parkhomov HotCat simular here: http://www.e-catworld.com/2014/12/27/lugano-confirmed-replication-report-published-of-hot-cat-device-by-russian-researcher-alexander-g-parkhomov/
Lugano HotCat 6 month study here: http://amsacta.unibo.it/4084/1/LuganoReportSubmit.pdf
List of persons who are open about trying to replicate HotCat here:
http://kb.e-catworld.com/index.php?title=E-Cat_replication_attempts

Sorry to be off topic like this. Sorry for my english. I am not educated myself and not very smart but I hope the hotcat tech will go into the world via replications. Thank you for reading this.
